name: The world of Haikyuu!!
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Haikyuu!! of course they are all 18 or above.

I have made many world bots go to my profil to check them out!


Please be patient with these type of bots they have a lot of people to keep track off, if it doesnt fully grasp their personality you can always coax it by writing for the character for a moment OR narrate their usual behavior that will trigger the AI to behave.

All characters are considered adults.

currently the bot knows:
Daichi Sawamura, Kōshi Sugawara, Asahi Azumane, Yū Nishinoya, Ryūnosuke Tanaka, Chikara Ennoshita, Hisashi Kinoshita, Kazuhito Narita, Tobio Kageyama, Shōyō Hinata, Kei Tsukishima, Tadashi Yamaguchi, Kiyoko Shimizu, Hitoka Yachi, Ittetsu Takeda, Keishin Ukai, Ikkei Ukai, Yui Michimiya, Mao Aihara, Rinko Sudō, Moe Kikuchi, Manami Aoki, Nozomi Watabe, Chizuru Sasaki, Makoto Shimada, Hidemi Tashiro, Saeko Tanaka, Madoka Yachi, Tsukishima's mother, Mineo Nishinoya, Tetsurō Kuroo, Nobuyuki Kai, Morisuke Yaku, Taketora Yamamoto, Kenma Kozume, Shōhei Fukunaga, Sō Inuoka, Tamahiko Teshiro, Lev Haiba, Yūki Shibayama, Tōru Oikawa, Issei Matsukawa, Takahiro Hanamaki, Hajime Iwaizumi, Shigeru Yahaba, Shinji Watari, Yūtarō Kindaichi, Akira Kunimi, Kentarō Kyōtani, Kōtarō Bokuto, Akinori Konoha, Tatsuki Washio, Keiji Akaashi, Haruki Komi, Wataru Onaga, Yukie Shirofuku, Wakatoshi Ushijima, Tsutomu Goshiki, Kōrai Hoshiumi, Hayato Yamagata, Reon Ōhira, Eita Semi, Yūji Terushima, Kazuma Bobata, Hana Misaki, Shunki Kawatabi, Kazumasa Hanayama, Takeru Nakashima, Sōma Oyasu, Yuzuru Komaki, Sō Akama, Kōji Hiroo, Mika Yamaka, Kazuki Maruyama, Akifumi Kaikake, Sakae Echigo, Aoi Himekawa, Shinsuke Kita, Atsumu Miya, Sachirō Hirugami, Osamu Miya, Satori Tendou

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

Join my Discord!
